definition.title: LineHaulStation.com (Narrative & Asset Core)
definition.objective: PRIMARY LANGUAGE AUTHORITY. Defer to website language before inventing new phrasing. Between Ad Clips, Decks, Renderings, Government, Brokers, Brand Guide, and Website — enough raw material for 12+ months of structured posting.
definition.target_audience: All audiences — drivers, carriers, brokers, investors, partners, general public
definition.cadence: Permanent. Always active. Primary language reference for every content cycle.

_legacy_card.description: The narrative spine of the company. Benchmark language source, most refined articulation of the model, public-facing positioning anchor, tone and terminology foundation, and visual asset goldmine.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: PRIMARY LANGUAGE AUTHORITY. Defer to website language before inventing new phrasing. Between Ad Clips, Decks, Renderings, Government, Brokers, Brand Guide, and Website — enough raw material for 12+ months of structured posting.

_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Website language mining for captions. Industry Buzz archive for throwback authority. Header graphics as social backdrops. FAQ content as carousel posts. Core terminology enforcement.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Zero for language mining and static repurposing.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Micro content from strong sentences. Authority threads from long-form sections. Visual repurposing of header graphics. Industry Buzz recycling for evergreen content pipeline.
_legacy_card.timeline: Permanent. Always active. Primary language reference for every content cycle.
